task_completion.description: Calculate Years to Maturity and Market Value for the 10 bonds on the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet, the columns for 'Years to Maturity' and 'Market Value' should be populated with numerical values for all 10 bonds.

task_completion.description: Calculate Macaulay Duration, Modified Duration, DV01, and Convexity for the 10 bonds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet, the columns for Macaulay Duration, Modified Duration, DV01, and Convexity should be populated with calculated numerical values for all 10 bonds.

task_completion.description: Mark bonds with Modified Duration exceeding 7.0 years with the flag 'DURATION_BREACH'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet, the text 'DURATION_BREACH' should appear in a flag/status column specifically for rows where the calculated Modified Duration is greater than 7.0.

task_completion.description: Determine the market-value-weighted average Modified Duration, total portfolio DV01, and total portfolio market value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet, the 'Portfolio Totals' section at the bottom should show calculated values for weighted-average Modified Duration (expect ~6.9884), total DV01 (expect ~$3,000), and total Market Value.

task_completion.description: Calculate the P&L impact for each bond and portfolio totals under +100bps, -100bps, and +50bps parallel rate shocks on the 'Shock_Scenario' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Shock_Scenario' sheet, there should be populated columns for +100bps, -100bps, and +50bps showing P&L impacts for each bond, along with a total row at the bottom (expect the +100bps total to be approximately -$298,951).

The Excel title bar should show 'bond_portfolio.xlsx' and there should be evidence (like a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer view) confirming it is saved in the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ExcelTasks\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Excel GUI to perform the calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Microsoft Excel application interface being interacted with, rather than a text editor or a Python script generating a CSV.

integrity.description: The agent used Excel formulas rather than hardcoding the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Excel formula bar should show formulas (e.g., =MDURATION(...), =IF(...)) being entered or selected, rather than typed static numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the manual Excel work.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing Python scripts, pandas operations, or openpyxl commands modifying the workbook.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected portfolio market-value-weighted average Modified Duration is approximately 6.9884 years. The total portfolio DV01 should be around $3,000 (ignore any metadata claiming 30,000-50,000). The +100bp shock P&L total on the Shock_Scenario sheet should be approximately -$298,951. The task requires using Excel functions like DURATION, MDURATION, and IF.
